div1.entryFree: Lottery, a game of chance in which lots are drawn: Merch. I, 2, 32. II, 1, 15. All's I, 3, 92. Troil. I, 3, 374. II, 1, 140. let high-sighted tyranny range on, till each man drop by l. Caes. II, 1, 119. Octavia is a blessed l. to him, Ant. II, 2, 248 (== prize, portion fallen to his share, allotment).
